name: PPC Ltd
summary: PPC Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and supplies cement, aggregates, readymix, lime and limestone, and fly ash products in South Africa, Botswana, Mozambique, Zimbabwe, Rwanda, and the Democratic Republic of the Congo. It also offers stone, sand, road layer materials, and special aggregate related products. The company was formerly known as Pretoria Portland Cement Company Limited and changed its name to PPC Ltd in October 2012. PPC Ltd was founded in 1892 and is headquartered in Johannesburg, South Africa.
